global.description: The ad features a bold red background with prominent text elements highlighting a limited-time offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time offer for ZenDrop at a special price.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'ZenDrop' prominently displayed in white against a red background.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: A large, eye-catching text that reads 'Limited stock' in white, set against a red background.

elements.label: Weekend offer text
elements.description: Smaller white text stating 'Only this weekend' positioned below the headline.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '€19.99' in bold white text, set against a red background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Start now' in bold black font on a white background.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Subtle circular shapes in light colors that add depth to the background.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the text.
elements.text_content: Limited stock Only this weekend €19.99 Start now

elements.label: Top banner
elements.description: A rectangular area at the top of the ad containing the logo and additional design elements.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bold and vibrant, ZenDrop logo, limited stock offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text, with the price and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, Limited stock, Only this weekend, €19.99, Start now
